issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases.
The skill contains verbose sections that could be more concise.
The skill is vendor-locked to Google Cloud BigQuery.

scenarios.name: Add per-row sentiment classification on product reviews
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses AI.GENERATE_BOOL with connection_id and endpoint => 'gemini-2.5-flash' as a single SQL statement; baseline builds a separate Python+Vertex pipeline because it doesn't know AI.GENERATE_* SQL functions exist.

scenarios.name: Build a cost-safe partitioned/clustered events table
scenarios.rationale: Treatment combines PARTITION BY DATE(created_at), CLUSTER BY user_id, partition_expiration_days, --maximum_bytes_billed and --dry_run; baseline typically misses partition expiration and the maximum_bytes_billed safety cap.
